refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable monitoring and controlling energy consumption to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; refining it into monitoring and control aspects clarifies how energy efficiency can be achieved and verified.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify energy consumption data collection accuracy and control actions effectiveness through telemetry data and operational logs over the evaluation period.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved in real-time.
FR2: Control operational parameters to optimize energy efficiency and meet target.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement real-time energy and tonnage telemetry system.
DP2: Develop adaptive control algorithms to optimize energy usage.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address monitoring and control requirements.

potential_sources: Telemetry data dependency between DP1 and DP2
coupling_check.notes: The coupling between monitoring and control is expected and managed via well-defined telemetry interfaces.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate sensors and data acquisition hardware are available.
Risk of control algorithm not adapting well to varying operational conditions.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing control algorithms to allow tuning and updates without impacting telemetry.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for energy monitoring and control integration.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Used for real-time energy and tonnage data exchange between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands to adjust control parameters.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts if energy efficiency targets are at risk or safety constraints violated.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and Teleoperation or Safety Services modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: Centralizes energy efficiency logic and data processing, minimizing diffusion.
Contains sensors and actuators but limited processing for energy efficiency.
Primarily for remote control, less relevant for energy efficiency logic.
Monitors safety but only indirectly related to energy efficiency.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Energy efficiency functionality is best contained within the NGHE Solution module to centralize logic and minimize diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution if too many responsibilities are centralized.
Interface dependencies with Vehicle and Safety Services must be carefully managed.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and consider sub-modularization within NGHE Solution if complexity increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well matched by the selected DPs, with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk if energy control logic spreads into Vehicle or Teleoperation modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the primary module, supporting good architectural packaging.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and operational logs accessible through NGHE Solution interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation of FRs to IM is clear with NGHE Solution owning the energy efficiency functionality.

recommended_revisions: Monitor complexity in NGHE Solution and consider sub-modularization.
Ensure interface definitions are precise to avoid diffusion.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment satisfy the requirements and architectural constraints with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved in real-time.
FR2: Control operational parameters to optimize energy efficiency and meet target.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Control algorithms can be tuned post-deployment.
open_risks: Control algorithm adaptability to varying conditions.
Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution.
